privileged_info_summary: The task relies exclusively on synthetically generated data via a Python script in setup_task.sh, which creates a plain text ODT document and a set of formatting guidelines. All metadata claims exactly match the generated content, including the report title, H1/H2 section headings, quote samples, demographic keywords ("Sterling", "1984", "1985", "Engineer", "Nurse", "2010"), and the signature name "Sarah Jenkins". The document size (460 words) easily surpasses the 200 min_word_count. However, it was discovered that the task is defective because verifier.py is missing entirely from the environment, making programmatic scoring impossible.
